digest.title: Unsloth GLM-5.2 – How to Run Locally
The text in Claude Code’s “Extended Thinking” output
At ISC, JUPITER Shows What Exascale Science Looks Like
digest.tldr: JUPITER, Europe’s first exascale supercomputer at Germany’s Forschungszentrum Jülich, runs on NVIDIA Grace Hopper Superchips and NVIDIA Quantum-X800 InfiniBand networking — and it’s had a busy year.

digest.title: NAIRR Science Program Reshapes Scientific Research, Powered by NVIDIA AI Infrastructure
NVIDIA Vera CPU Opens the Way for Agentic Scientific AI at Los Alamos National Laboratory
digest.tldr: Mission, Vision and Veritas — new Los Alamos National Laboratory (LANL) supercomputers to be built with HPE and NVIDIA — are tapping NVIDIA Vera CPUs to accelerate scientific discovery, unlocking agentic AI for science.
